ANSC799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)

ANSC898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits)

ANSC899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)

ANSC624 Recent Advances in Animal and Avian Sciences (1 Credit) Seminar course in advanced animal science research. Restriction: Must be an Animal Sciences graduate student. Credit Only Granted for: ANSC698C or ANSC624. Formerly: ANSC698C.

ANSC625 Developing Presentation Skills (1 Credit) Seminar designed to teach oral presentation skills for animal science students. Restriction: Must be an Animal Sciences graduate student. Credit Only Granted for: ANSC625 or ANSC698D. Formerly: ANSC698D.
